## What

Briefly describe the change and why it is needed.

## How

High-level notes for reviewers (key files, design trade-offs). Link related issues if any.

## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build GeoArtist.slnx` succeeds
- [ ] `dotnet test GeoArtist.slnx` succeeds (when tests apply)
- [ ] Public API or behavior changes are documented (XML docs, release notes, or follow-up issue filed)
